form.formComment: Colt back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 18 at Kyoto January 11 over 1800m, 4 len behind Narita Esperanza carrying 57.0kg at $13.10. First up last campaign fourth of 8 at Hanshin December 7 over 2000m, 1.3 len behind Matenro Zero carrying 56.0kg at $2.60. Look for a bold run.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 50-day let-up. At the latest run held ground to the line 2nd of 14 at this track on February 21 over 1800m, 3 len behind Coeli Vento with 57.0kg at $2.20. The race before that 2nd of 11 at Kyoto Dirt on January 25 over 1800m, neck behind Rock Band carrying 57.0kg at $6.10. Rates highly. Big chance.
